[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101000 2
1 0001101 3
2 1111001 5
3 1000100 2
4 0110000 2
5 1010100 3
6 1011010 4
7 0001001 2

01 10 1010000 2
12 21 0001000 1
23 32 0001000 1
34 43 0001100 2
45 54 0011001 3
56 65 1000000 1
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 0010000 1

02 20 0000000 a
13 31 0001000 1
24 42 0001001 2 match 7
35 53 0101000 2 match 0
46 64 0000100 1
57 75 0110000 2 match 4
60 06 1000100 2 match 3
71 17 0010000 1

03 30 0000100 1
14 41 0011000 2
25 52 0001001 2 match 7
36 63 0000100 1
47 74 0010000 1
50 05 1010000 2
61 16 1000000 1
72 27 0000000 a

15 51 1011000 3
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0100000 1
